title: AI Resistant Watermark for our sports photography brand
brief: About us We're an event photography brand shooting marathons and running events across the Philippines. We display thousands of photos online (thumbnails, previews, full size) and need a watermark to brand and protect them from being scraped and edited. What we need A custom watermark design we can overlay on our photos. You handle the creative design — we just need it to look good, work across all our image sizes, and be hard for AI tools to remove. We need two things delivered: - A final transparent PNG (high resolution). - The editable source file (Photoshop PSD, Illustrator AI, or whatever software you design in). No coding or algorithms — this is purely a design job. The resistance must come from the design itself, not from any software pipeline. Creative direction The design is yours. It does not need to spell out a specific brand name — design a custom mark, wordmark, monogram, symbol, or pattern in your own style. It should still function as a recognizable ownership signature on our photos. (You may optionally incorporate "FOKUS.ph" if it fits your concept — your call.) We want something clean, distinctive, and professional that fits a modern sports/event photography brand. We can share brand colors as a reference if you'd like, but you're free to propose your own direction. AI-removal resistance (core requirement) The watermark must be heavily resistant to AI removal — not foolproof (nothing is), but far harder to strip than a simple corner logo. Since this is a stat
